questions.question: Describe the differences between a relational database management system (RDBMS) and a NoSQL database management system. (Ch 8.1-8.5, 15 marks)
What is a primary key in a relational database, and why is it necessary? (Ch 8.1-8.5, 5 marks)
Explain the concept of normalization in database design, and provide an example of denormalization. (Ch 8.1-8.5, 15 marks)
